title: Triple Killer Accidentally Shows Police Her Horrifying Secret

beats.description: Dramatic cold open showing police arrival at the getaway motel and initial discovery of burned remains.
Backstory established through 911 calls from Kane reporting missing family and requesting a welfare check.
Mike warns police about Kane's behavior and firearms; initial house search reveals staged clutter and dispatcher contradictions.
Fire reported near the property; officers discover a burned vehicle containing three bodies.
Autopsy confirms identities; Kane's wife reveals history of domestic violence and provides a disturbing audio recording.
Cassandra calls 911 claiming Kane is missing; police uncover lies via social media and Walmart surveillance footage.
Phone tracking locates Cassandra in Mississippi; investigators travel to prepare for confrontation.
Motel confrontation with Cassandra; she breaks down, slips up, and attempts to deflect blame onto Mike.
Kane voluntarily enters police station; detective dismantles his alibi, green Subaru is found with incriminating evidence, and Kane is arrested.
Police visit Cassandra at her parents' home; she confesses to the cover-up and implicates Kane in the murders.
Final interrogation of Kane; he confesses to concealing the bodies while maintaining a fabricated story about the killings.
Case resolution summary, formal charges outlined, and final reflections on the investigation.
